title: Huawei 100M SFP optical transceiver, SM, 1310nm, 15km, 2x LC konektor, DDM
description: The Huawei eSFP-FE-LX-SM1310 is a single-mode 100Mbps SFP module with a wavelength of 1310nm and two LC connectors for connections up to a distance of 15km The LC connectors in the SFP module have UPC polishing
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Mbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1310 Distance [km] 15 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Tx power [dBm] 15 up to -8 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 28 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
